title: Pugmeowla's Infinity Stone Core
description: A fully reimagined and expanded Infinity Craft experience for Palladium, featuring the Infinity Gauntlet, all Infinity Stones, and extensively revamped content inspired by Lucraft Core.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2b0c7db482d15ca3cd45a1248744400a82f3b25.png)   ### Pugmeowla’s Infinity Stone Core is the Official 1.20.1 port of Infinity Craft. It brings the six Infinity Stones and the Infinity Gauntlet from the Marvel Cinematic Universe to life, complete with their unique powers, structures, and lore-based mechanics. Rather than being a simple recreation, the mod’s goal is to expand and modernize every aspect of the original Lucraft Core “Infinity experience" from 1.12.2, adapting it to the improved systems and flexibility of Palladium. Infinity Stone Core blends seamlessly with popular mods such as Fsang’s Addonpack, Tinker’s Construct, and others, ensuring compatibility and creative freedom for modpack developers. Whether you’re collecting stones for power, exploring their mysterious worlds, or experimenting with cross-mod mechanics, this mod offers a fresh yet familiar experience for longtime Lucraft fans and newcomers alike. From the shimmering Cosmi-Rod to the intricately designed stone structures scattered throughout the world, every feature has been tuned for immersion and fun, bringing a touch of the MCU’s epic scale into Minecraft. **Join the discord server! Become a part of the community and view early teasers, ask questions, and suggest features!** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png)
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c261b79b33380118369f4deb3bd4a6ce0df8202f.png)](https://discord.gg/W5ZwaQbwan) [![YouTube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42f9bb962b4558f1f11480e0ab885261c373f482.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@pugmeowla) [![Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a947a55948cefe3a8dda706f9a2e9eda11f04d8.png)](https://ko-fi.com/pugmeowla)
![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png) ## Meet The Team! [![pugmeowla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/891a2035f50e27ecfc4632ac2ab24ba1d5bddc29.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Pugmeowla) **Retired Owner** ![Dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31f4ede94b0cdcc5c9db6197bb1f9fe7b51945cd.png) **Assets Provider** ![Tras](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05df26dc305bf0bd29d55d6f0fdf887807947ced.png) **Assets Provider** ![dark_soldier_52](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1e8200327457622ed8dd6a95e56d15dc14ee27e.png) **Assets Provider** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png) ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png) ## **Content** - **All Six Infinity Stones**: Power, Space, Reality, Time, Soul, and Mind - **Infinity Gauntlet & Skins**: Fully compatible with Tinker’s Construct casting - **Nanotech Iron Man Suit Integration**: Works with Fsang’s and Satsu’s implementations - **Cosmi-Rod**: A universal channeling tool for all stones, not just the Power Stone - **Stone Containers**: Includes the Orb, Tesseract, Aether, Eye of Agamotto, and Scepter - **Soul-Sacrificing System**: A unique mechanic tied to the Soul Stone - **Double-Edged Sword**: A powerful but high-risk weapon mechanic - **Unique Structures**: Dedicated structures for each Infinity Stone and the Cosmi-Rod - **Custom GUIs & Visual Additions**: Refined interfaces and visual polish throughout ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png) ## **Obtainment** *There are structures for each Infinity Stone scattered across multiple dimensions.* **Overworld** - **Norse Village** — Space Stone - **Sanctum Sanctorum** — Time Stone **The End** - **Sanctuary** — Mind Stone ### Other Dimensions The remaining stones are located on custom planets and require either: - A **spaceship** (from *Ad Astra*, *Tier 4*, or *Cosmic Horizons*), **or** - The **Space Stone’s "Teleport Command" Ability** **Svartalfheim** - **Aether Chamber** — Reality Stone **Morag** - **Morag Temple** — Power Stone **Vormir** - **Vormir’s Edge** — Soul Stone ### **Infinity Gauntlet** - The **Gauntlet Cast** can be found in **Weaponsmith Chests** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png) ## **Dependencies** Infinity Stone Core relies on a number of core mods to function properly: - **Palladium** - **Pehkui** - **Curios API** - **Pantheon Sent** - **KubeJS** - **Colourful Hearts** - **GeckoLib** - **Huge Structure Blocks** - **Ad Astra** or **Cosmic Horizons** (compatibility) - **Tinker’s Construct** (compatibility) - **Fsang18’s Heropack** (compatibility) - **Satsu’s Iron Man Addon** (compatibility) These dependencies ensure full integration across armor systems, scaling mechanics, and inter-mod functionality. ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png) ## **Textures and Inspirations:** * Textures and assets from: * Infinity Craft * Lucraft Core * Heroes Expansion * Speedster Heroes * Star Tech, Man! The Legendary Mod? * Inspirations: * Infinity Gauntlet Datapack - GoldSlimeling91 * Special thanks to: * Lori * Gokublack365 * coaber * curse of the med 𓀔𓀇𓀅𓀋𓀡𓀡𓀕𓀠𓀧𓀨𓀣𓀷𓀷𓀿𓀿 * OnixST * DogBoi64 * Giga (Ultrasupreme) * The Infinity A Team * the_mask55 * currentbrick * dark08159 * and everybody on the discord server :D ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png) Videos:
